items.name: Bunny Bliss Pierced Beanie
items.description:
Hop into style with the Bunny Bliss Pierced Beanie, a playful and edgy twist on a classic accessory. This cozy beanie features adorable bunny ears that add a whimsical touch to your look, while the surrounding piercings deliver a bold, modern edge. Crafted from high-quality, soft fabric, it ensures both comfort and standout style. Perfect for adding a unique flair to your Roblox avatar or making a statement in any casual outfit, the Bunny Bliss Pierced Beanie combines fun and fashion in one irresistible package. Embrace the ultimate fusion of cute and cool with this must-have beanie.

items.description:
An adventurous character who feels right at home in cheesy and crispy worlds. 🧀✨

Meet Mr. Cheese, the ultimate funny food character for your next adventure! Whether you are exploring cheesy worlds or just hanging out with friends, this yellow cheese bundle is designed to stand out.

Perfect for roleplay (RP), meme avatars, and fans of cute food characters. This full body character works great in any R15 compatible game.

items.name: Roman "Septimani" Scutum Shield
items.description:
For Pseudo-Comitatenses.

"I'm a lion pizza chicken!" - Clovis

"Say it again!" - Syagrius

The Septimani were one of the Gallic pseudo-comitatenses legions, and would be one of the two led by Syagrius. These men would have fought in the Battle of the Catalaunian Plains, and they were part of the Gallic army even after the fall of the Western Empire, being wiped out a few years after the Battle of Soissons.

Created by: Davicolt
Modeled by: Davicolt
Textured by: Davicolt/Erika

Support Davicolt's work! He is a very talented 3D modeler and deserves lots of credit.
